title: elvish
html:
elvish

File Read

Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged

elvish -c 'print (slurp </path/to/input-file)'

File Write

Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged

elvish -c 'print DATA >/path/to/output-file'

Shell

Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged

elvish
excerpt: elvish File Read Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged elvish -c 'print (slurp </path/to/input-file)' File Write Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged elvish -c 'print DATA >/path/to/outp
